title: Services people in the UAE often compare for a Netherlands move
intro: Document guides, planning tools, transfers, housing, insurance, and mobile—useful to line up alongside MVV and residence permit steps.

items.reason: Understand legalisation paths when UAE attestation or foreign apostilles feed into Dutch procedures.
Plan sworn translations when Dutch authorities request Dutch or English versions.
Map document categories before you submit MVV or municipality paperwork.
Turn your route into a phased checklist with ?from=uae context.
Sequence BSN, banking, and insurance in your first weeks after landing.
Move AED and EUR with transparent pricing while you coordinate deposits and rent.
Digital Dutch banking often used soon after BSN and address.
Traditional Dutch banking option some employers and landlords recognise easily.
Short and mid-term listings while you search for a long-term rental in Amsterdam, Rotterdam, or beyond.
Compare Dutch basic health insurance once you are resident.
Dutch SIM options after you land.
